rules.title: Ensure 'Enforce password history' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
rules.description: Password history is set to only 6, allowing rapid password reuse.

rules.title: Ensure 'Maximum password age' is set to '365 or fewer days'
Ensure 'Minimum password age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
Ensure 'Minimum password length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
rules.description: Minimum password length is 8 characters, well below the CIS recommendation of 14.

rules.title: Ensure 'Password must meet complexity requirements' is set to 'Enabled'
Ensure 'Account lockout duration' is set to '15 or more minute(s)'
rules.description: Account lockout is not configured (set to 0). No brute-force protection.

rules.title: Ensure 'Account lockout threshold' is set to '5 or fewer invalid logon attempt(s)'
Ensure 'Access this computer from the network' is set appropriately
Ensure 'Audit: Force audit policy subcategory settings' is set to 'Enabled'
Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Domain: Firewall state' is set to 'On'
Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Domain Profile: Firewall state' is set to 'On (recommended)'
rules.description: Domain firewall profile is disabled, allowing unrestricted inbound connections on the domain network.

rules.title: Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Private Profile: Firewall state' is set to 'On (recommended)'
Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Public Profile: Firewall state' is set to 'On (recommended)'
Ensure 'Audit Credential Validation' is set to 'Success and Failure'
Ensure 'Audit Application Group Management' is set to 'Success and Failure'
Ensure 'Audit Logon' is set to 'Success and Failure'
Ensure 'Audit Other Logon/Logoff Events' is set to 'Success and Failure'
Ensure 'Audit Removable Storage' is set to 'Success and Failure'
Ensure 'Configure SMB v1 client driver' is set to 'Enabled: Disable driver (recommended)'
rules.description: SMBv1 client driver is not disabled. Combined with SMBv1 server enabled (Nessus 57608), this represents a critical vulnerability to EternalBlue-class attacks. Directly contradicts FIPS/encryption claims.

rules.title: Ensure 'MSS: (ScreenSaverGracePeriod) The time in seconds before the screen saver grace period expires'
Ensure 'Turn on BitLocker drive encryption' is configured
Ensure 'Configure use of passwords for operating system drives'
Ensure 'Require use of specific cipher suite for encryption' - SSL/TLS settings
rules.description: Unable to verify TLS configuration. Registry key for Schannel cipher suite order not found. This suggests TLS is using Windows defaults which may include TLS 1.0.

rules.title: Ensure 'Turn off Autoplay' is set to 'Enabled: All drives'
Ensure 'Configure Windows Defender SmartScreen' is set to 'Enabled'
